title: OpenAPE Grant
description: A grant representing a permission request and its lifecycle state.

decided_by.description: Identifier of the user who approved or denied the grant.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the grant was created.

decided_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the decision was made.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the grant expires.

used_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the grant was consumed.
